query: SELECT actorId, name, actorType as type, origin, threatLevel, sophistication, motivation, firstSeen, lastActive, LEFT(description, 200) as descSnippet FROM threat_actors ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT actorId, name, actorType as type, origin, threatLevel, sophistication, motivation, firstSeen, lastActive, LEFT(description, 200) as descSnippet FROM threat_actors ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 10

rows.name: UAC-0050
rows.descSnippet: UAC-0050 is a CERT-UA tracked Russian threat group that targets Ukrainian government organizations with the Remcos RAT. The group uses phishing campaigns themed around military and government communic

rows.name: ScarCruft
rows.descSnippet: ScarCruft is a Kaspersky-tracked North Korean threat group also known as APT37/Reaper. The group targets South Korean organizations, defectors, and journalists using zero-day exploits and custom malwa

rows.name: Everything Bagel
rows.descSnippet: An adversary with all adversary abilities

rows.name: ALPHV/BlackCat Simulation
rows.descSnippet: ALPHV/BlackCat simulation — RDP brute force, Mimikatz credential harvesting, Safe Mode AV bypass, ExMatter exfiltration, and cross-platform Rust encryption.

rows.name: Akira Simulation
rows.descSnippet: Akira ransomware simulation — Cisco VPN exploitation, LaZagne credential extraction, WinSCP exfiltration, and hybrid ChaCha20+RSA-4096 encryption.

rows.name: Cl0p Simulation
rows.descSnippet: Cl0p ransomware simulation — MOVEit/GoAnywhere exploitation, LEMURLOOT webshell deployment, mass file collection, and automated exfiltration.

rows.name: Black Basta Simulation
rows.descSnippet: Black Basta ransomware simulation — QakBot delivery, credential dumping, lateral movement via PsExec, rclone exfiltration, and ChaCha20+RSA encryption.

rows.name: You Shall (Not) Bypass
rows.descSnippet: This adversary consists of several abilities to bypass UAC on an updated Windows 10 system
